mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM clients
AND status = #{status}
AND (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR ceo_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR business_reg_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY updated_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO clients (name, business_reg_no, corporate_reg_no, ceo_name, industry, phone, email, zip_code, address, address_detail, status, memo) VALUES (#{name}, #{businessRegNo}, #{corporateRegNo}, #{ceoName}, #{industry}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{zipCode}, #{address}, #{addressDetail}, #{status}, #{memo})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM client_contacts WHERE client_id = #{clientId} ORDER BY is_primary DESC, sort_order ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO client_contacts (client_id, name, department, position, phone, email, is_primary, sort_order) VALUES (#{clientId}, #{name}, #{department}, #{position}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{isPrimary}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM client_contacts WHERE id = #{id} AND client_id = #{clientId}
